steps.title: Identify the relationship (Pythagoras / SOH-CAH-TOA)
steps.content:
The triangle has a right angle ($90°$), an angle of $24°$, and the unknown angle $a$. Use the triangle angle-sum: the three interior angles sum to $180°$.
$$90° + 24° + a = 180°$$

steps.title: Solve for the missing side
steps.content:
Solve for $a$:
$$a = 180° - 90° - 24° = 66°$$
That matches choice B — B is correct.
